restated_intent: Build the Coherence Engine pipeline `lgwks cohere` that composes G0 (cargo build/test compiler gate) → G1 (architecture) → G3 (framework-reality) → G2 (idiom) via the GateRegistry. HARD non-PASS blocks ship with diagnosis for retry; ADVISORY accumulates into a report. Every Verdict is appended to the cognition-log for audit and replay.

steps.step: Implement G0Verifier in lgwks_cohere.py: shell out to `cargo build` and `cargo test` in --crate-dir; compile-error → FAIL with rustc diagnosis; test failure → FAIL.
covers: registers gates in canonical order G0→G1→G3→G2 (G0=cargo build/test, G1, G3 HARD; G2 ADVISORY)
a hallucinated-API candidate is blocked (by G0 compile-error, surfaced as the G0 verdict) and never ships

steps.step: Instantiate G1 (ArchVerifier rules from arch-rules.json), G3 (G3Verifier with --crate-dir), G2 (IdiomVerifier) and register them in GateRegistry with correct klass.
covers: registers gates in canonical order G0→G1→G3→G2 (G0=cargo build/test, G1, G3 HARD; G2 ADVISORY)

steps.step: Call run_pipeline(candidate, context, registry). On HARD non-PASS return diagnosis for retry. On all PASS, emit advisory report.
covers: a hallucinated-API candidate is blocked (by G0 compile-error, surfaced as the G0 verdict) and never ships
an all-pass candidate ships with the advisory report attached and all verdicts appended to the cognition-log

steps.step: Append every Verdict to the cognition-log (lgwks_cognition.py) with audit trail.
covers: an all-pass candidate ships with the advisory report attached and all verdicts appended to the cognition-log
pipeline is deterministic and replayable from the log

steps.step: Wire `lgwks cohere --file candidate.rs --crate-dir /path/to/crate [--json]` CLI in lgwks binary.
covers: registers gates in canonical order G0→G1→G3→G2 (G0=cargo build/test, G1, G3 HARD; G2 ADVISORY)

steps.step: Write tests/test_cohere.py: (a) hallucinated-API candidate blocked by G0, (b) all-pass candidate ships with report, (c) pipeline deterministic/replayable from log.
covers: a hallucinated-API candidate is blocked (by G0 compile-error, surfaced as the G0 verdict) and never ships
an all-pass candidate ships with the advisory report attached and all verdicts appended to the cognition-log
pipeline is deterministic and replayable from the log

steps.step: Run python3 -m unittest discover tests and confirm all green.

invariants: the host Rust crate/working-dir for G0+G3 is an explicit --crate-dir argument (the candidate's project); cohere fails CANNOT_DECIDE if no crate context is given — it never guesses
G0 ownership of symbol-existence; G3 only adds version-skew (per U4)
